description_text: Good Smile Company Nendoroid — Megurine Luka V4X (Character Vocal Series 03) Celebrate an elegant milestone of digital vocal synthesis and sophisticated character architecture. Good Smile Company officially presents the stunning Nendoroid Megurine Luka V4X , scaling down her sleek and modernized virtual singer software design into the beloved handheld collector size. Masterfully sculpted by the technical artisans at toytec D.T.C under the strict production cooperation of Nendoron, this complete painted figure flawlessly embodies her mature charm and poetic poise. This premium edition arrives equipped with three interchangeable face plates to capture her diverse artistic range. Collectors can seamlessly swap between a warm and bright cheerful face , a passionate and focused singing face perfect for mid-concert tracking, and an endearing mesmerized smiling face that highlights her softer, personal moments. Her signature long, flowing pink hair layout features subtle gradient paintwork, beautifully catching ambient room light to accentuate her dynamic structural movement. description_text: A Surreal, Elegant Take on the Ultimate Feline Phenomenon It is a universally acknowledged truth that cats behave like liquid—and now, that playful internet running joke has been transformed into a breathtaking work of contemporary art! The "Cats are Liquid" Silver Moon Figure by WE ART DOING is a high-end designer art toy based on the brilliant, surreal illustrations of artist Karaage Toufu. Standing at a sophisticated 19.2 cm tall, this variant features the fluid feline drenched in an ethereal, moonlight-inspired silver palette. The sculptural design beautifully mimics the fluid property of liquid, freezing a single, impossibly graceful moment in time with a soft, radiant metallic luster that catches the light from every angle. Premium Mixed-Media Composition with Ingenious Magnetic Engineering WE ART DOING is renowned for pushing the boundaries of traditional figure manufacturing, and this stunning release showcases their mastery of materials. Moving away from standard PVC, this collectible art piece is crafted from high-grade Polyurethane (PU) to achieve an ultra-smooth, high-gloss surface that elevates the rich silver and pearlescent gradients. meta_description: Secure the complete Pokémon Scale World Sinnoh Region 3 Set by Bandai Candy. Features 1/20 scale figures of Cyrus, Darkrai, Shaymin (Sky Forme), and more.
description_text: Bandai Candy Toy Pokémon Scale World — Sinnoh Region Volume 3 Complete Box Set Recreate the vast ecological diversity of the Sinnoh region right on your collector shelf with flawless proportions. Bandai Candy Toy officially expands its highly celebrated uniform-scale lineage with the Pokémon Scale World Sinnoh Region 3 Set . Built around the core concept of a shared universe where humans and Pokémon stand side-by-side, every single asset in this premium box collection is mapped strictly to an authentic 1/20 physical scale framework , letting you visualize the exact size discrepancies between various species as depicted in the games and anime. This third wave focuses heavily on the dramatic milestones of the Pokémon Diamond and Pearl storyline. The highlight of the human roster is none other than Cyrus , the cold and calculating supreme boss of Team Galactic, sculpted with immaculate screen accuracy. Standing alongside the villainous mastermind are powerful and elusive Sinnoh region legends, including the terrifying phantom of nightmares, Darkrai , and the graceful, high-flying Shaymin (Sky Forme) . Approximately 100mm (10cm) Power Requirement: Batteries required for audio feature (sold separately) Hobby Genki Tip: The Nendoroid Toshiya Miyata is a legendary acquisition for J-Pop enthusiasts and figure purists alike, introducing a unique audio recording engine directly to a premium 10cm articulated framework
description_text: Good Smile Company Nendoroid — Toshiya Miyata (Kis-My-Ft2) Celebrate a spectacular, first-of-its-kind milestone in idol merchandise history. Good Smile Company officially introduces Toshiya Miyata , the multi-talented member of the legendary J-Pop group Kis-My-Ft2 , joining the world-renowned Nendoroid chibi figure collection. This special project was built through extensive trial and error, with Miyata actively participating in the planning process, proposing structural specifications, and refining the aesthetic lines to deliver a figure created entirely under his passionate supervision. Standing at the signature height of approximately 100mm (10cm), this figure introduces an amazing premier mechanic: a built-in audio playback function integrated inside the framework. Collectors can trigger brand-new vocal tracks and phrases custom-recorded by Toshiya Miyata specifically for this Nendoroid release (please note: batteries are sold separately). Sculpted by the expert artist Shichibee (Matsuda Model) with the precise production cooperation of Nendoron, every detail of his charismatic stage uniform and warm demeanor has been captured flawlessly.
